channel.title: Email Security on considerITman
channel.description: Recent content in Email Security on considerITman

item.title: Defender for Office 365 Anti-Phishing: Stop Impersonation and AiTM Attacks
item.description: Configure Defender for Office 365 anti-phishing policies to block impersonation attacks, spoof intelligence, and AiTM session cookie theft in Microsoft 365.
